data.name: Destructive Wave
data.description: You strike the ground, creating a burst of divine energy that ripples outward from you. Each creature you choose within 30 feet of you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 5d6 Thunder damage and 5d6 Radiant or Necrotic damage (your choice) and be knocked prone. A creature that succeeds on its saving throw takes half as much damage and isn't knocked prone.

data.name: Circle of the Titan
data.description: Druids who channel primordial titan power through Wild Shape.

features.name: Circle of the Titan Spells
features.description: You always have certain spells prepared. At 3rd: Enlarge/Reduce, Thaumaturgy. At 5th: Thunderwave. At 7th: Fear. At 9th: Fire Shield. At 11th: Destructive Wave.

features.name: Titan Form
features.description: As a Bonus Action, you expend a use of Wild Shape to assume a titan form (Behemoth, Leviathan, or Insectoid) instead of a beast form.

features.name: Dire Impact
features.description: While in Titan Form, when you deal damage with an attack, you can knock the target prone.

features.name: Primal Havoc
features.description: While in Titan Form, your attacks deal extra force damage.

features.name: Monstrous Appetite
features.description: You can recover Wild Shape uses when you finish a Short Rest.

data.name: Hell Knight
data.description: Fighters bound to infernal pacts who weaponize hellfire and lingering wounds.

features.name: Diabolical Gift
features.description: You gain proficiency in one skill: Deception, Performance, or Sleight of Hand.

features.name: Hell-Forged Weapon
features.description: When you finish a Long Rest, you can touch a weapon and infuse it with hellfire.

features.name: Infernal Wound
features.description: When you hit with a hell-forged weapon, you can inflict an infernal wound (Constitution modifier uses per Short Rest).

features.name: Advanced Wounds
features.description: Your infernal wounds grow deadlier and harder to heal.

features.name: Infernal Equipment
features.description: You can create infernal armor or a second hell-forged weapon when you finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Hellfire Surge
features.description: As a Bonus Action, you can wreathe yourself in hellfire.

features.name: Devil's Misfortune
features.description: When a creature within 60 feet fails a saving throw, you can use your Reaction to impose disadvantage on another save it makes before your next turn.

features.name: Infernal Bargain
features.description: You can bargain with infernal power to cheat death.

data.name: Demonic Sorcery
data.description: Sorcerers whose magic is torn from the Abyss.

features.name: Abyssal Rupture
features.description: When you activate Innate Sorcery, you can open an abyssal rupture that enhances your magic for the duration.

features.name: Demonic Spells
features.description: You always have certain spells prepared. At 3rd: Bane, Dissonant Whispers. At 5th: Spike Growth, Web. At 7th: Bestow Curse, Dispel Magic. At 9th: Giant Insect, Hallucinatory Terrain.

features.name: Abyssal Realm
features.description: You can pull creatures into a fragment of the Abyss.

features.name: Abyssal Conduit
features.description: Your abyssal magic grows stronger while Innate Sorcery is active.

features.name: Abyssal Explosion
features.description: You can detonate abyssal energy in a devastating blast.
